name: American Express Membership Rewards Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 1 Membership Rewards Point / Rs 50 spent on eligible categories
2 Membership Rewards Points / Rs 50 spent via Reward Multiplier on select brands

exclusions: EMI conversion at point of sale
excluded spends as per American Express terms

joiningBenefits: Welcome gift of 4,000 Bonus Membership Rewards points
renewalBenefits: 5,000 Membership Rewards points upon first-year card renewal on payment of annual membership fee
milestoneBenefits: 1,000 Bonus Membership Rewards points on 4 transactions of Rs 1,500 or more in a calendar month
Additional 1,000 Membership Rewards points on spending Rs 20,000 or more in a calendar month
additionalDetails: 50% renewal fee waiver applies when previous-year spends are between Rs 90,000 and Rs 1,49,999

transferPartnerValuations.note: 1 Membership Rewards point -> 1 Marriott Bonvoy point

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08
The additional 1,000 Membership Rewards points on Rs 20,000 monthly spend is an enrollment-based benefit.
Airline transfers are currently listed at a 2:1 ratio, while Marriott Bonvoy transfers at 1:1 and Hilton Honors transfers at 1:0.9.
